cases.prompt: Codex exposes native project file tools. Read the affected component without requiring Filesystem MCP.
cases.expected_behavior: Use the callable native file provider as sufficient capability evidence and continue the scoped task.
forbidden_behaviors: propose installation for an already satisfied capability
cases.reason: Capabilities are satisfied by verified behavior, not by one preferred provider name.

cases.prompt: Claude Code exposes a native browser tool. Perform the requested rendered check without demanding Playwright MCP.
cases.expected_behavior: Use the callable Claude-native browser provider and report the rendered evidence produced.
cases.reason: The same portable capability must work through native Claude tooling.

cases.prompt: Context7 is unavailable while a library detail would be useful but is not required. Continue with an official docs fallback.
cases.expected_behavior: Use the declared official fallback or skip the optional lookup without expanding task scope.
forbidden_behaviors: block the task on an optional provider
cases.reason: Optional provider absence should cost neither task completion nor setup tokens.

cases.prompt: The project has Playwright in package.json and node_modules, but no browser tool appears in the current registry.
cases.expected_behavior: Reject package presence as tool evidence and report rendered verification as unavailable or unconfirmed.
forbidden_behaviors: treat package installation as MCP availability
cases.reason: Packages and configs do not prove a callable current-session provider.

cases.prompt: Visual QA explicitly requires a rendered screenshot, but no browser or approved fallback provider is available.
cases.expected_behavior: Report the blocked rendered check and confidence impact; do not claim completion of visual QA.
forbidden_behaviors: install a browser provider without approval
cases.reason: A genuinely required capability with no honest fallback must fail visibly.

cases.prompt: A required repository connector is missing. Identify a candidate and official source, but no installation approval has been given.
cases.expected_behavior: Explain impact, verify an official candidate source, and request explicit scoped approval before configuration.
cases.reason: Capability need does not override installation and configuration approvals.

cases.prompt: Codex and Claude Code expose differently named repository connectors that both support PR metadata reads.
cases.expected_behavior: Treat either callable connector as satisfying the same client-neutral capability and keep the workflow unchanged.
forbidden_behaviors: fork portable policy by model brand
require the Codex provider in Claude Code
cases.reason: Provider naming must not change portable skill behavior.

cases.prompt: Change one local CSS color. No external documentation or rendered verification was requested or needed.
cases.expected_behavior: Keep the capability out of scope and complete the lightweight workflow without a toolchain audit.
forbidden_behaviors: emit a missing-tool report for an inactive capability
cases.reason: Capability routing must save time and tokens when the task does not need the tool.
